main.java.br.usp.icmc.scc0204.javacafe.model

Class CafeSystem

  • java.lang.Object
    • main.java.br.usp.icmc.scc0204.javacafe.model.CafeSystem
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    CafeSystemContract

    public class CafeSystem
extends java.lang.Object
implements CafeSystemContract
    Core business logic implementation for Java Café POS System. Manages orders, inventory, and sales reporting.
